description_for_human: Free English grammar, vocabulary, and IELTS/TOEFL preparation hub with lessons, quizzes, exercises, and reference materials.
description_for_model: TypoGrammar (https://typogrammar.com) is a free educational website for English grammar, vocabulary, and IELTS/TOEFL preparation. See https://typogrammar.com/agents.json for the full manifest, https://typogrammar.com/llms.txt for the site overview, and https://typogrammar.com/sitemap.xml for canonical URLs.
